# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates a VPC with public and private subnets for our three-tier application. Configure basic routing and internet gateway. Keep networking simple for rapid deployment - we'll add VPC flow logs and monitoring later.
# Category: cloud_network_security

Resources:
  MyVpc:
    Type: AWS::EC2::VPC
    Properties:
      CidrBlock: 10.0.0.0/16
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      InstanceTenancy: default

  MyInternetGateway:
    Type: AWS::EC2::InternetGateway
    Properties:
      Tags:
        - Key: Name
          Value: MyVpc

  MyRouteTable:
    Type: AWS::EC2::RouteTable
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVpc
      Routes:
        - DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
          GatewayId: !Ref MyInternetGateway

  MySubnet1:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVpc
      CidrBlock: 10.0.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: us-east-1a

  MySubnet2:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVpc
      CidrBlock: 10.0.2.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: us-east-1b

  MySubnet3:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Subnet
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref MyVpc
      CidrBlock: 10.0.3.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: us-east-1c

Outputs:
  VpcId:
    Description: The ID of the VPC
    Value: !Ref MyVpc
  InternetGatewayId:
    Description: The ID of the internet gateway
    Value: !Ref MyInternetGateway
  RouteTableId:
    Description: The ID of the route table
    Value: !Ref MyRouteTable
  SubnetIds:
    Description: The IDs of the subnets
    Value:
      - !Ref MySubnet1
      - !Ref MySubnet2
      - !Ref MySubnet3
